title: Ma mha 4 khaa khrap
original_title: มะหมา 4 ขาครับ
overview: The life of Makham and his gang, once well-treated dogs, takes a turn for the worse when they are abandoned. Still, they believe in the existence of a blissful land, supposedly a heaven for dogs, and set out on a journey to find it.
